headline: AI is here to stay, and it will disrupt every industry: Vast Data CEO
summary: Renen Hallak, CEO of Vast Data, talks about the increasing deployment of AI in enterprises across different industries, and the role Vast Data plays in supporting the implementation of AI applications.

headline: How The Standard Chartered (LSE:STAN) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Realign
summary: The consensus fair value estimate for Standard Chartered has shifted from £18.96 to £19.48, putting a fresh spotlight on where analysts think the shares should sit. Behind that, you are seeing bullish price targets pushing up toward 2,200 GBp and more cautious cuts toward about 1,863 GBp, which together frame the debate around execution risks and remaining upside. Read on to see how to make sense of these moving targets and keep track of the story as it develops. Analyst Price Targets don't...

headline: AI funding pressures ease as cash flow growth outpaces spending: JPMorgan
summary: The financial strain tied to the tech sector’s heavy investment in artificial intelligence appears less severe than previously expected, as rising cash flows continue to outstrip capital expenditure growth, according to strategists at JPMorgan. A team led by Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou estimates that the sector is on track to deliver cash flow growth of about 25% this year, compared with capital spending growth of roughly 20%.
